description_long: This is a compact hatchback car with a sporty design, featuring a two-tone color scheme of white on the upper body and blue on the lower panels and bumpers. The car has a short, sloping rear with a prominent rear spoiler, and wide fender flares that give it an aggressive stance. The wheels are large with low-profile tires, and the car is equipped with dual exhaust pipes at the rear, suggesting a performance-oriented build. The front end has rectangular headlights and two black vents on the hood, while the side profile reveals two doors and a small, rearward passenger compartment. The windows are tinted black, and the overall shape is boxy yet aerodynamic, typical of classic rally-inspired hatchbacks. The car appears to be made primarily of metal with plastic trim and glass windows, and is suitable for urban driving scenarios.
description: A sporty, two-tone hatchback car with wide fenders, a rear spoiler, and dual exhausts, finished in white and blue. It features two doors, tinted windows, and a compact, performance-oriented design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, wide fenders, and the rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dual exhaust pipes, rear spoiler, and taillights.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, two doors, and the rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rectangular headlights, hood vents, and wide blue front bumper.
